meaning: n.棒,棍,杖,(表示官职的)权杖,(柳树等幼树的)嫩枝
examples: You can't simply wave a wand and get rid of nuclear weapons.
Visitors can expect to be searched with a metal-detecting wand.
With a wave of her magic wand, she changed the frog into a handsome prince.
Hermione at one point complains about male wizards competing to see whose wand is most powerful.
Typically, a hand-held wand is used to take the image, which takes between five and 45 minutes.
